parsed.clarification_question: Which focus do you want prioritized for this single paragraph: A) copyediting for clarity, flow, and concision (R1.6), or B) checking the internal argument and tempering categorical claims within the paragraph (R1.2 + RX.2)?

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph advances causal and generalization claims that benefit from a check of internal reasoning and claim scope within the paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: Given a single paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level polish is the most likely intent, targeting grammar, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any judgments on logic or style should note uncertainty due to limited context (only one paragraph).
rationale.RX.2: The text contains categorical assertions, so care is needed to avoid reinforcing overclaims in feedback.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain constrained to this paragraph rather than broader section-level restructuring or experimental design.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading methodological claims or practices that could negatively affect annotators or downstream users.
rationale.RX.5: Comments should be traceable to specific sentences or phrases to maintain clear provenance.
